description_long: This is a single, rugged work boot with a high ankle collar and a visibly worn exterior. The upper is constructed from dark, weathered leather with scuff marks and dirt stains, especially concentrated around the toe and heel. The collar is padded and covered in a lighter, frayed fabric that shows significant discoloration and wear. Metal eyelets and hooks secure the laces, which are loosely tied and partially undone. The sole is thick, made of durable rubber, and shows signs of heavy use, with dirt embedded in the tread. The overall appearance suggests this boot has been used extensively in outdoor or industrial environments.
description: A single, rugged, high-ankle work boot made of worn leather and rubber, with a frayed padded collar and visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the frayed, discolored collar and the back of the thick, dirty rubber sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the worn leather upper, metal eyelets, and the padded, frayed collar.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the loosely tied laces, scuffed toe, and the overall rugged, dirty appearance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the full profile of the boot, including the worn leather, eyelets, and thick sole.
